summary: Theme park application with attractions, future timeline, and special events
architectural_notes: Theme park attractions organized by area (Kid Grove, etc.)
Future timeline feature for upcoming attractions
Special events system for after-hours processions
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Cartoon-style illustration of bees performing a coordinated dance show on a stage with Kid Grove themed backdrop (bees-dance-show.dim_800x600.png)
- Vibrant water park illustration showing a large tornado slide structure with swirling water effects and three other distinct slide types (soak-kingdom-waterpark.dim_1200x800.png)
- Dramatic nighttime procession scene with illuminated character floats, performers, and theatrical lighting at 1 AM (farewell-procession-night.dim_1200x600.png)

existing_features.title: Add 'Bee's Dance Show' as a new show attraction in Kid Grove themed land. The show should be added to the existing Kid Grove content without replacing any existing attractions. Include a description of the show featuring bees performing dance routines.

Add 'Soak Kingdom' water park scheduled to open in 2040. The water park should include exactly 4 water slides: one tornado slide and three additional slide types (such as body slides, tube slides, or speed slides). Include descriptions for each slide type and the overall water park attraction.

Add '1 AM Farewell Procession' as a special nightly event that occurs on select nights after the park closes at 1 AM. The procession should feature characters, floats, and other theatrical elements. Include details about which select nights it runs and what guests can expect to see during this late-night farewell event.

Display all three new additions (Bee's Dance Show, Soak Kingdom, and 1 AM Farewell Procession) in the appropriate frontend sections: Bee's Dance Show in the upcoming attractions timeline under Kid Grove, Soak Kingdom in the 2040 timeline section, and 1 AM Farewell Procession in the shows/events section with appropriate time and scheduling information.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add Bee's Dance Show as new attraction in Kid Grove
Add Soak Kingdom water park opening in 2040 with 4 slides (tornado slide + 3 others)
Add 1 AM Farewell Procession on select nights after park closes with characters and floats
